hero.title: Transform Your Medical Practice Management
hero.description: Comprehensive platform that simplifies appointment scheduling, patient management, and billing for healthcare professionals.

turnosmedicos.title: TurnosMedicos: Smart Appointment Management
turnosmedicos.description: Complete system for medical appointment management with automatic confirmations, WhatsApp reminders, and intuitive dashboard.
turnosmedicos.feature_1: Online scheduling available 24/7 for your patients
turnosmedicos.feature_2: Automatic confirmations and reminders via WhatsApp
turnosmedicos.feature_3: Dashboard with real-time metrics and reports
turnosmedicos.feature_4: Integration with billing systems and insurance

services.label: Our Services
services.title: Complete Solutions for Your Medical Practice
services.subtitle: We offer digital tools specifically designed for healthcare professionals.

service_1.title: Appointment Management
service_1.description: Smart scheduling system with automatic reminders and WhatsApp confirmations.

service_2.title: Digital Medical Records
service_2.description: Secure electronic medical records accessible from any device.

service_3.title: Integrated Billing
service_3.description: Billing automation for insurance companies and private patients.

service_4.title: Telemedicine
service_4.description: Video consultation platform integrated with your schedule and appointment system.

service_5.title: Reports & Analytics
service_5.description: Detailed metrics about your practice to make better decisions.

service_6.title: Patient App
service_6.description: Mobile app for your patients to manage appointments and access their history.

pricing.label: Plans & Pricing
pricing.title: Choose the Ideal Plan for Your Practice
pricing.subtitle: Flexible plans that adapt to the size of your medical practice.
